method.loca_vs_python: Python continuation n, q, and s are interpolated onto LOCA log_w points; n and q use log-value interpolation.
method.loca_vs_auto: AUTO continuation n, q, and s are interpolated onto LOCA log_w points; n and q use log-value interpolation.
method.loca_vs_eq92_94: Eq. 92--94 approximations are evaluated at each LOCA branch point.
method.loca_vs_python_root_solve: LOCA n, q, and s are interpolated onto independent Python root-solve check points.
method.loca_vs_digitized: LOCA n, q, and s are interpolated onto digitized paper Figure 1 w points; n and q use log-value interpolation.
